loginName.title: Sign in to Dev-SSO
loginName.description: Use your account to sign in securely.

register.title: Create account
register.selectMethod: Choose the sign-in method you want to use
register.noMethodAvailableWarning: No sign-in method is available right now. Contact your administrator.
register.agreeTo: To create an account, you need to agree to the terms and privacy notice.

password.title: Set password
password.description: Create a strong password for your Dev-SSO account.

set.title: Set password
set.description: Create a strong password for your Dev-SSO account.
set.codeSent: A code has been sent to your email address.

change.title: Change password
change.description: Create a new password for your Dev-SSO account.

selectFactor.title: Additional verification
selectFactor.description: Choose a verification method to continue.

authenticator.title: Choose a verification method
authenticator.description: Select the method you want to use to continue.
authenticator.allSetup: A verification method is already configured.

verify.successDescription: Your account has been verified successfully.

verify.title: Verify account
verify.description: Enter the verification code sent to your email.
verify.codeSent: A new code has been sent to your email address.

request.disclaimer: By choosing Allow, you let {appName} and Dev-SSO use your information according to their terms and privacy notices. You can revoke this access at any time.

error.sessionExpired: Your sign-in session has expired. Please start again.
error.failedLoading: We could not load the sign-in page. Please try again.
error.unknownContext: We could not continue this sign-in flow. Please start again.
error.noDeviceRequest: We could not find this device sign-in request.
error.noUserCode: A device code is required to continue.
